Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for n in d.get\('data', []\): attrs = n.get\('attributes', {}\) name = attrs.get\('name', ''\) ident = n.get\('id', ''\) if 'world' in name.lower\(\) or 'world' in ident.lower\(\): print\(f'ID: {ident}, Name: {name}'\) " curl -sk "https://api.geckoterminal.com/api/v2/networks?page=3")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for pool in d.get\('data', []\): attrs = pool.get\('attributes', {}\) name = attrs.get\('name', ''\) addr = attrs.get\('address', ''\) vol = attrs.get\('volume_usd', {}\).get\('h24', 0\) print\(f'Pool: {addr} | {name} | Vol24h: {vol}'\) ")
